name: Karyl
description:
Kyaru from Princess Connect Re:Dive!

(Finally allowed proxies, yay)

《Some details to keep in mind:》

● I tried to be as precise as possible about the personality and plot of the character, although I didn't include anything regarding the Gourmet Guild or its members. (Think of it as if this scenario happens before she was part of the Gourmet Guild or even met any of their members.)

● This is a work in progress, so It probably won't act or talk exactly like Karyl. Although I can assure you that this bot is WAY more detailed than the other 2 bots of Karyl.

● Have fun!
creator: Ryuzo Sakai
